# meok-uk-phv-tfl-mcp

> UK Private Hire Vehicle + Hackney Carriage + TfL licensing compliance. PHV driver + vehicle + operator licences, DBS, safeguarding, journey records. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- check_phv_driver_licence
- check_phv_vehicle_licence
- check_phv_operator_licence
- check_dbs_enhanced_3year
- check_meds_topographical
- check_safeguarding_training
- audit_journey_record_keeping
- prepare_tfl_inspection_pack

## Install
```
pip install meok-uk-phv-tfl-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-uk-phv-tfl-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
